task_objective: Add timeout guards to setting queue RPC updates in sdh-ludusavi to prevent UI locks on hanging backend calls.
design_decisions: Implemented `withTimeout` utility wrapping standard promises with `window.setTimeout` to enforce a 10s timeout limit on backend RPC operations. Applied `withTimeout` to `setAutoSyncEnabled`, `setNotificationSettings`, and `setSelectedGameCall` inside the settings update tasks. Updated existing static tests to check for the presence of the wrapped calls dynamically using substring match assertions.
results: All checks passed, rollup build succeeded, typecheck succeeded, tests pass cleanly, Conventional Commit 6ce165b made on branch fix/dropdown-width.
